new_claims.claim_text: Iran OFFICIALLY CLOSES the STRAIT OF HORMUZ until further notice due to Israel’s attack on Lebanon
new_claims.notes: Highly significant claim from a single source, requires independent verification. Overlaps with existing claim_4 but is more specific.

new_claims.claim_text: 3 Kuwaiti power stations & water distillation plants were struck by Iranian drones this morning, causing significant damage
new_claims.notes: Claim of a direct attack on critical infrastructure, requires independent verification. Distinct from existing claim_6 which refers to an oil tanker.
